headline: Dear Lam Research Investors, Mark Your Calendars for April 22: Its Stock May Not Look Back
summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) reports fiscal third-quarter 2026 results on April 22 after the close. With four consecutive beats behind it and AI-driven equipment demand accelerating, this print will test whether momentum can hold through rising macro and geopolitical headwinds. A Record Year Rolls Into a Critical Quarter Last quarter, Lam posted $5.344 billion in revenue, ... Dear Lam Research Investors, Mark Your Calendars for April 22: Its Stock May Not Look Back

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Lam Research, Raises Price Target to $260
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Joseph Moore   maintains Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $254 to $260.
